must_detect.matched_text:
Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum for NamThinh Bamboo Holdings JSC regarding investor relations and employee banking workflows in Vietnam.
This notice aligns with Decree 13/2023 on personal data protection and the Securities Law, and is intended for interactions with the Ho Chi City Stock Bourse and the VN Securities Council portals.
We process contact details for corporate representatives, role mailboxes (e.g., ir@namthinh-bamboo.vn), and generic employment data that do not, by themselves, identify a specific natural person
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum for NamThinh Bamboo Holdings JSC regarding investor relations and employee banking workflows in Vietnam.
This notice aligns with Decree 13/2023 on personal data protection and the Securities Law, and is intended for interactions with the Ho Chi City Stock Bourse and the VN Securities Council portals.
We process contact details for corporate representatives, role mailboxes (e.g., ir@namthinh-bamboo.vn), and generic employment data that do not, by themselves, identify a specific natural person.
PII is collected only where necessary, and may include weak identifiers such as work location, job title, and device tags, which are assessed in context to avoid identifying an individual when standalone.
For securities disclosure, MNPI is excluded; only public facts already announced on the bourse or regulator portals are used, such as published quarterly timelines and boa
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Explicitly described as an invalid ticket reference; not a real identifier.
